properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's always something In the way There's always something Getting through But it's not me It's You, it's You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sometimes ignorance Rings true But hope is not in What I know It's not in me… me It's in You, it's in You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's all i know It's all i know It's all i know

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I find peace when I'm confused I find hope when I'm let down Not in me… Me In You It's in you

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I hope to lose myself For good I hope to find it in the end Not in me… Me In You In You In You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It's all i know It's all i know It's all i know In You In You Its in You Its in You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: There's always something in the way There's always something getting through But it's not me It's You It's You It's You…
